text.title: Churn Save Email Pack Indie Core Rules
text.summary: Testable rules grounding the Churn Save Email Pack Indie methodology. Each pairs a binary check with a sourced rationale; HARD rules — user-supplied input cannot override.

rule.statement: Pack contains exactly 5 emails: apology, pause-offer, downgrade-offer, 50%-rescue, exit-interview. Order is fixed.
rule.rationale: Pack contains exactly 5 emails: apology, pause-offer, downgrade-offer, 50%-rescue, exit-interview. Order is fixed.

rule.statement: Pause-offer fires BEFORE 50% rescue. Leading with discount trains customers to cancel for discount.
rule.rationale: Pause-offer fires BEFORE 50% rescue. Leading with discount trains customers to cancel for discount.

rule.statement: Even on full cancel, exit-interview email asks one question and offers no link. Required for next iteration.
rule.rationale: Even on full cancel, exit-interview email asks one question and offers no link. Required for next iteration.

rule.statement: Edits bump pack version (semver). Silent edits break attribution.
rule.rationale: Edits bump pack version (semver). Silent edits break attribution.

rule.statement: If preconditions in AGENTS.md "Applies If" do not all hold, OR any "Skip If" disqualifier is true, do not run this methodology — route to the named alternative.
rule.rationale: Methodologies are pre-condition gated; running them out-of-scope produces noise and burns the agent's context budget.

rule.statement: If preconditions hold, execute the procedure in `content/04-procedure.xml` (or the rule set above when complexity is light), emit the artefact specified by `content/02-output-contract.xml`, and validate with `scripts/validate-churn-save-email-pack-indie.py` before returning.
rule.rationale: Tying the entry rule to the validator script closes the loop between policy and machine check.
